title: Motte-and-Bailey Fallacy
abstract: This tool identifies and analyzes the logical fallacy known as "Straw Man," where an opponent's argument is deliberately misinterpreted or exaggerated to make it easier to attack.
abstract_zh: 这个工具超级好用，尤其是当你发现有人把朋友的观点往坏处想，故意夸大其词来攻击的时候，它能立马识别出来，还给你分析这种逻辑谬误有多low！特别适合那些喜欢在背后给对手下黑手的朋友使用哦。
